_comment: Ahrena MCP: internal server exposing the framework as queryable tools. Default-on per .directives.sample. install.py copies tools/ahrena-mcp/ to .ahrena/tools/ahrena-mcp/ and runs `pipx install -e <path>` so the `ahrena-mcp` console script is on PATH. Override via .ahrena/mcp/ahrena.json. If pipx is unavailable, install.py emits a warning with manual install instructions; the command below stays the same once the package is on PATH.
